name: Ensalada Guanajuato (Five Bean Salad Guanajuato Style)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Drained OR canned cooked pinto beans
1/2 Green pepper, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
If cooking your own pinto and black beans, cook until firm-tender and not mushy. Combine the pinto beans, black beans, garbanzo beans, green beans, and wax beans in a large bowl. Add the green pepper and red onion. In a small bowl, mix together the oil, vinegar, salt, oregano, garlic powder, and black pepper to taste. Pour over the salad and toss gently but thoroughly. Cover and refrigerate overnight. Just before serving, add tomatoes and mayonnaise. Toss until well blended.
Makes 6 to 8 servings.
